testcase.name: test_filter_correccion_parcial_no_filter_returns_all_flagged

failure.message: AssertionError: es_correccion_parcial is NOT returned in list. The endpoint /api/vulnerabilidades uses response_model=List[Vulnerabilidad] which strips this computed field. Frontend cannot display the 'partial correction' flag without an extra call to /aplicaciones-resultados per row. assert 'es_correccion_parcial' in {'aplicaciones': [], 'aplicaciones_resultados': None, 'codigo': 'VULN_VERIFY_BACKEND_1784557662', 'codigo_control': None, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration33_remediacion_parcial.py:181: in test_filter_correccion_parcial_no_filter_returns_all_flagged assert "es_correccion_parcial" in data[0], ( E AssertionError: es_correccion_parcial is NOT returned in list. The endpoint /api/vulnerabilidades uses response_model=List[Vulnerabilidad] which strips this computed field. Frontend cannot display the 'partial correction' flag without an extra call to /aplicaciones-resultados per row. E assert 'es_correccion_parcial' in {'aplicaciones': [], 'aplicaciones_resultados': None, 'codigo': 'VULN_VERIFY_BACKEND_1784557662', 'codigo_control': None, ...}
